doi.description: Digital Object Identifier of the publication

document type.description: Type of publication (e.g., conference paper, journal article)

paper id.description: Unique identifier for the paper in the dataset

scope of study.description: Level of study such as module, system, or cell level

number of pv modules in study.description: Number of PV modules included in the study

country.description: Country where the PV system is located

pv module name.description: Name or identifier of the PV module

mounting.description: Mounting configuration of the PV module

location of information.description: Where the degradation information was extracted from (text, figure, table)

annual degradation rate of other paramet.description: JSON string containing degradation rates of parameters like Isc, Voc, Imp, Vmp, FF

analysis method.description: Method used for degradation analysis (e.g., LR = linear regression)

source of initial power value.description: Source used for initial power value (e.g., nameplate)

grid-connected.description: Whether the PV system is grid connected

materials and construction.description: Materials and construction components of the PV module

from_text.description: Whether value was extracted from text

from_figure.description: Whether value was extracted from figure

from_table.description: Whether value was extracted from table

source of value.description: Source where value was extracted from
